summary: V12 SYD-EZE error derivation now shown inline. Key correction: computed error is -73% (not -78%) using dome's own coordinates (Sydney r=7160/θ=+32.5, Buenos Aires r=7298/θ=+58.0) in dome's V12 formula. Also corrects "roughly 2,600 km" to computed 3,194 km. Cites dome's own "25-78% on long pairs" admission. V13 characterization tightened per curmudgeon rec.
